alkylation reagent: the samples were alkylated by adding 10 mM iodacetamide
alkylation concentration: the samples were alkylated by adding 10 mM iodacetamide
cleavage agent: the samples were digested with trypsin (protein: trypsin = 100:1)
collision energy: the 20 most intensive ions were fragmented with 28% normalized collision energy
enrichment method: affinity enrichment of Kbz peptides with pan anti-Kbz antibody
instrument: the eluted peptides were analyzed by a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: the eluted peptides were analyzed by a Q Exactive mass spectrometer (ThermoFisher Scientific, San Jose, CA) using a nanospray source
labeling: the results showed that the quality of the spectra from reductive alkylation was better than that with two rounds of propionylation
reduction reagent: the samples were reduced by adding 5 mM TCEP
reduction concentration: the samples were reduced by adding 5 mM TCEP
